adds.rationale: Rocket Lab is the only US-listed pure-play small-satellite launch and spacecraft manufacturer, with a $143M MDA/Globalstar manufacturing contract signed in February 2022 and accelerating space-systems revenue through Q2 2022 — concrete commercial-milestone evidence of buildup-phase entry into the rockets/spacecraft wave the profile names as its first next tech wave.

news_evidence.summary: Rocket Lab awarded $143M contract by MDA to manufacture 17 spacecraft for the Globalstar LEO constellation — largest space-systems contract to date.
Rocket Lab Q2 2022 earnings: launch services revenue growing toward $19M with space-systems contracts diversifying the revenue base.
Rocket Lab wins two contracts totaling $14M for separation systems for US Space Development Agency satellites, adding US government contract cadence.

adds.rationale: The Global X Robotics and AI ETF (BOTZ, launched September 2016) provides diversified liquid exposure to the robotics wave; August 2022 manufacturing earnings confirm a structural labor-shortage-driven automation demand surge matching the early-buildup entry point the profile targets.

news_evidence.summary: BOTZ launched September 12, 2016 by Global X; tracks global robotics and AI automation companies — established ETF with six years of history and adequate volume.
Emerson reports ~47% boost to Q3 2022 profits, attributing the rise to growing manufacturing demand for industrial robots offsetting a labor shortage.

adds.rationale: NuScale Power (NYSE: SMR, listed May 2022) is the first and only US-listed pure-play small modular reactor company; the September 7, 2022 Task Order with Poland's KGHM to begin formal SMR deployment — backed by $351M cash and no debt — is the inaugural international commercial-deployment milestone marking SMR's entry into the buildup phase of the nuclear wave.

news_evidence.summary: NuScale completes SPAC merger and begins NYSE trading as 'SMR' on May 3, 2022, raising ~$380M including $235M PIPE.
NuScale Q2 2022 earnings: balance sheet of $350.8M cash and no debt; reaffirms outlook after $381M SPAC/PIPE proceeds.
NuScale and Poland's KGHM sign first Task Order (Sept 7, 2022) to initiate SMR deployment work — the company's first international deployment milestone post-IPO.

rationale_overall: The starter watchlist of five big-tech/AI tickers carries zero exposure to the profile's named next waves. This rebalance closes that gap: RKLB for rockets/spacecraft (pure-play small-sat launch/manufacture with revenue inflecting), BOTZ for robotics (diversified ETF capturing the labor-shortage automation buildup), and SMR for nuclear (the only US-listed pure-play SMR company, first international deployment Task Order signed 23 days before this rebalance). Quantum remains uncovered: IONQ, the only liquid pure-play, faces a May 2022 Scorpion Capital fraud allegation and securities class action, unsuitable until resolved. Defense (ITA/PPA) deferred since the Ukraine-war rearmament trade already drew ~$2B of inflows in early 2022, reducing the early-buildup advantage. Post-change watchlist hits the 8-cap with four wave buckets (AI, rockets, robotics, nuclear) plus SPY.
